text:
I have a whole home generator that has failed about 50% of the time. Where I live there's no good breakage of wind and wide open country area so we lose power several times a year.

Installed a gateway that uses my car to power my house. Just tested and works flawlessly! Super https://x.com/HackingDave/status/2041907164504068484/photo/1

classification.reason: Tweet discusses home power generation and car-to-house power gateway, which is hardware/electrical infrastructure rather than software tools
